## Installation

See [INSTALL.md](https://github.com/majorsimon/midium/blob/main/INSTALL.md) for full instructions including macOS security prompts and per-app audio setup.

### Quick start

| Platform | File | Notes |
|----------|------|-------|
| macOS | `Midium_*_macos.app.zip` | Unzip, right-click → Open |
| Linux | `*.AppImage` or `*.deb` | See below |
| Windows | `*.msi` or `*.exe` | Run installer, click "More info → Run anyway" |
